app.name: VerveCoach
app.one_sentence_promise: Rehearse the conversations that matter before you walk into the room.
app.target_user: Managers, founders, interview candidates, salespeople, and professionals who need to prepare for emotionally or financially important conversations.
app.painful_moment: The user has one difficult conversation coming up and knows improvising will go badly.
app.why_different: Rehearsal-driven, not a generic chat assistant or note pad; the product is about practicing responses under pressure.
app.why_users_pay: Better communication changes outcomes in interviews, negotiations, feedback conversations, and sales calls.
app.subscription_model: Free limited rehearsal scenarios; premium for unlimited sessions, custom scenario libraries, progress history, advanced coaching modes.
app.local_first_mvp_scope: Scenario setup, role-based prompt cards, rehearsal flows, reflection notes, session history, optional on-device critique where available.
app.future_backend_roadmap: Cross-device sync, shared coaching templates, mentor review, richer speech analysis.
core_workflows: Review weak spots and next-best phrasing
ios_native_features: App Intents for quick rehearsal starts
app.ar_ml_llm_fit: An on-device LLM is useful for critique and response variation, but the app ships strong rule-based rehearsal flows and fallbacks.
app.design_direction: Confident, minimal, psychologically safe with low-friction rehearsal cards and strong focus states.
app.claude_design_prompt: Design an iPhone rehearsal app for difficult conversations with calm focus, strong voice interaction, scenario setup, and premium coaching feedback surfaces.
app.app_store_positioning: A private rehearsal app for people who need better outcomes from the conversations that matter.
key_risks: LLM dependency must not become a device-eligibility trap
Could drift into generic self-help if rehearsal structure is weak
app.invalidation_criteria: If the app is just a prompt box asking an AI what to say, it fails.
app.v1_build_scope: Local scenario rehearsal app with manual setup, guided response practice, audio capture, review notes, optional model-backed critique where supported, onboarding, paywall, persistence.
